# awscc_servicecatalog_portfolio (List Resource)

List all resources for `AWS::ServiceCatalog::Portfolio` resource type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "awscc_servicecatalog_portfolio" "example" {
  provider = awscc
}
```
